name: Sesame Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 Chicken, frying (2 1/2 - 3 lbs.) cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine and oil in a baking pan.
2. Allow mixture to cool slightly but not harden.
3. Shake chicken in seasoned flour until coated.
4. Roll pieces in the oil in the baking pan and arrange so pieces do not touch.
5. Sprinkle with lemon juice and sesame seeds.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Turn chicken; sprinkle with sesame seeds and minced onion.
8. Pour wine into the bottom of the pan and cook for 30-45 minutes, basting occasionally, until done.
